Dataset Description: A Polish annotated dataset for aspect-level sentiment triple extraction.
A Polish lexical dictionary providing synonym relations between words, used as a reference resource for synonym replacement and lexical normalization.

Tasks: Text Classification, Language Modeling, Information Retrieval
Dataset Description: A large corpus of transcripts from the proceedings of the Polish Parliament (Sejm), designed for linguistic and computational research.

Two sets of algorithmically constructed Polish pseudowords (pseudonouns and pseudoverbs) that are orthographically and phonologically plausible, designed for psycholinguistic research on grammatical class processing.

Tasks: Cross-lingual Transfer, Machine Translation, Language Modeling
Dataset Description: The Polish portion of the OpenSubtitles2018 corpus, a large-scale parallel corpus extracted from movie and TV subtitles, widely used for machine translation and cross-lingual research
A corpus of Polish news summaries created to support the development and evaluation of automated single-document summarization tools. It includes both abstractive and extractive summaries

Tasks: Lexical Semantics, Semantic Similarity, Word Sense Disambiguation
Dataset Description: The Polish WordNet (plWordNet) integrated within the Multilingual Central Repository (MCR), a large-scale lexical-semantic knowledge base aligned with Princeton WordNet.
A dataset of political advertisements collected from Twitter, annotated with information such as advertiser, target audience, and sentiment, used for analyzing political communication and framing.

The first Polish open-domain question answering (OpenQA) dataset. It consists of 7Ł¬000 questionsŁ¬ 87Ł¬525 manually labeled evidence passagesŁ¬ and a corpus of over 7 million candidate passages from Polish Wikipedia
A corpus created to support the development and evaluation of tools for automated single-document summarization of Polish. It contains a large number of manual summaries of news articles.

The first Polish large-scale Visual Question Answering (VQA) dataset. It contains over 40k questions in Polish about images from the Visual Genome dataset, designed to advance multimodal AI research for Polish.

A collection of articles from the Web archive of ˇ°Rzeczpospolitaˇ±, a nationwide Polish daily newspaper (1993-2002). It served as the original text source for the creation of the Polish Summaries Corpus

Tasks: Sentiment Analysis, Natural Language Understanding, Information Retrieval
Dataset Description: A collection of datasets from the SemEval-2023 workshop, which includes multiple shared tasks (e.g., sentiment analysis, irony detection, multilingual complex NLI) aimed at advancing the state of the art in semantic analysis.
An open-source, continuously updated, large-scale corpus of Polish text from diverse sources, designed for training and evaluating Polish language models. It also provides data processing tools.
A set of pre-trained Word2Vec models for Polish, trained on large corpora including web-crawled data, made available through the CLARIN-PL repository.
A set of 299 standardized pictures with Polish norms for name agreement, visual complexity, and concept familiarity, used as stimuli in psycholinguistic picture naming tasks.
